2605.06548.title: Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model
2605.06548.paper_summary: Large language models have achieved remarkable success under the autoregressive paradigm, yet high-quality text generation need not be tied to a fixed left-to-right order. Existing alternatives still struggle to jointly achieve generation efficiency, scalable representation learning, and effective global semantic modeling. We propose Cola DLM, a hierarchical latent diffusion language model that frames text generation through hierarchical information decomposition. Cola DLM first learns a stable text-to-latent mapping with a Text VAE, then models a global semantic prior in continuous latent space with a block-causal DiT, and finally generates text through conditional decoding. From a unified Markov-path perspective, its diffusion process performs latent prior transport rather than token-level observation recovery, thereby separating global semantic organization from local textual realization. This design yields a more flexible non-autoregressive inductive bias, supports semantic compression and prior fitting in continuous space, and naturally extends to other continuous modalities. Through experiments spanning 4 research questions, 8 benchmarks, strictly matched ~2B-parameter autoregressive and LLaDA baselines, and scaling curves up to about 2000 EFLOPs, we identify an effective overall configuration of Cola DLM and verify its strong scaling behavior for text generation. Taken together, the results establish hierarchical continuous latent prior modeling as a principled alternative to strictly token-level language modeling, where generation quality and scaling behavior may better reflect model capability than likelihood, while also suggesting a concrete path toward unified modeling across discrete text and continuous modalities.
2605.06548.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在自回歸範式下取得了顯著的成功，但高品質的文本生成不必拘泥於固定的從左到右的順序。現有的替代方案仍然難以同時實現生成效率、可擴展的表示學習和有效的全局語義建模。我們提出了 Cola DLM，一種層次化的潛在擴散語言模型，通過層次信息分解來框定文本生成。Cola DLM 首先通過文本變分自編碼器學習穩定的文本到潛在的映射，然後在連續潛在空間中使用區塊因果 DiT 建模全局語義先驗，最後通過條件解碼生成文本。從統一的馬可夫路徑視角來看，其擴散過程執行潛在先驗傳輸，而不是標記級的觀察恢復，從而將全局語義組織與局部文本實現分開。這一設計產生了更靈活的非自回歸歸納偏見，支持在連續空間中的語義壓縮和先驗擬合，並自然擴展到其他連續模態。通過涵蓋 4 個研究問題、8 個基準、嚴格匹配約 20 億參數的自回歸和 LLaDA 基準，以及高達約 2000 EFLOPs 的擴展曲線，我們確定了 Cola DLM 的有效整體配置，並驗證了其在文本生成中的強擴展行為。綜合來看，這些結果確立了層次化連續潛在先驗建模作為一種原則性的替代方案，以取代嚴格的標記級語言建模，其中生成質量和擴展行為可能比似然更能反映模型能力，同時也暗示了在離散文本和連續模態之間統一建模的具體途徑。
2605.06548.author: Hongcan Guo et.al.
2605.06548.authors: Hongcan Guo, Qinyu Zhao, Yian Zhao, Shen Nie, Rui Zhu, Qiushan Guo, Feng Wang, Tao Yang, Hengshuang Zhao, Guoqiang Wei, Yan Zeng
